vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn toàn cảnh bao la
vocab.example: From the observation deck, I was greeted by a panoramic vista of the entire city skyline at twilight.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh tao, thoát tục (như không có thực)
vocab.example: The mist clinging to the limestone karsts gave the bay an ethereal beauty that felt almost otherworldly.

vocab.meaning: trải dài ra (thường dùng cho thành phố hoặc thung lũng)
vocab.example: The metropolitan area seemed to sprawl out indefinitely beneath us as we reached the mountain top.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô lượn sóng
vocab.example: The view consisted of undulating hills covered in vibrant greenery, creating a soothing natural pattern.

vocab.meaning: để lại dấu ấn không thể phai mờ (trong tâm trí)
vocab.example: The sight of the sun setting over the Sahara Desert left an indelible mark on my memory.

vocab.meaning: vùng nước xanh ngắt, trong xanh
vocab.example: The contrast between the white sand and the azure waters was simply breathtaking.

vocab.meaning: địa hình hiểm trở, gồ ghề (nhưng mang vẻ đẹp hoang sơ)
vocab.example: I was captivated by the rugged terrain of the canyon, showcasing millions of years of geological history.
In the early morning, the entire valley was bathed in golden light, making the landscape look surreal.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh xanh tươi trù phú
vocab.example: The hike was grueling, but it was worth it to see the verdant landscape stretching toward the horizon.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp quyến rũ nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: Unlike many tourist traps, this remote lookout point retained its unspoilt charm and tranquility.
